Name: [Corruption] Extendable Short Sword
Desc: Chain Attacks and the Ultimate deal <color=#2BAD00>significantly more DMG</color>, but Agents also take <color=#CF4029>significantly more DMG</color>. (Appears only in Rally Commissions.)
Desc2: When the expansion button is functioning properly, it's a great magic prop for intimidating people. But when the button malfunctions... well, that's even more intimidating.
